documents.title: Saved passwords disappeared after update
documents.content: After updating Firefox Desktop my saved logins vanished from the Password Manager and I cannot get them back.

documents.title: No puedo sincronizar mis contrasenas
documents.content: Las contrasenas no se sincronizan entre mi telefono y mi portatil, es muy frustrante.

documents.title: Sync keeps signing me out
documents.content: Firefox Sync repeatedly logs me out and fails to sync tabs and passwords.
